lic.title: Licenses & Certificates — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
lic.intro.label: Quality Management System
lic.intro.title: Quality — the Foundation of Our Work
lic.intro.desc: As an enterprise within the ROSATOM State Corporation structure, the company operates strictly within industry regulatory requirements. Having current certificates is a mandatory condition for participation in nuclear industry projects, state tenders and long-term programs of Russia's largest industrial enterprises.
lic.certs.label: Confirmed Compliance
lic.certs.title: Compliance Certificates
lic.cert.scope: Development, production and supply of products based on inorganic sorbents; provision of engineering design services, project management, technical consulting and energy modeling for industrial facilities, including nuclear industry facilities.

lic.gallery.label: Original Documents

lic.gallery.sub: Click on a document to view in full size. To obtain certified copies, send a request to info@raecht.ru.
lic.cta.label: Document Inquiries
lic.cta.title: Need Certificate Copies?
lic.cta.desc: Certified copies of certificates are provided upon official request. Contact us — we will promptly prepare the required document package.
